examples: The water quality is very saline, and you can't wash the deposits off. There's yellow slimly stuff around the water tank, so I don't like using it.
A big hit at this year's book fair was the Digital Bookstore, where visitors could read e-books by flipping through pages on slimly-designed touch screens.
Voters may fear extra bureaucracy, although some people in local government reckon that councils could deliver services designed by slimly staffed assemblies.
